name: Mardi Gras Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cauliflower and scrape the carrots.
2. Parboil each for 1 minute. Remove, drain, and cool.
3. Break the cauliflower into bite-sized pieces.
4. Slice the carrots in half-inch pieces.
5. Drain juices from beans and pimento.
6. Mix all ingredients well and place in a covered bowl in the refrigerator.
7. Allow at least 12 hours for marination.
